name: super-sean-007-jrpg
description: Production-ready website and playable HTML5 JRPG foundation for Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems.

scripts.dev: npm run generate:audio && npm run slice:assets && npm run slice:mobs && npm run slice:objects && npm run slice:icons && vite --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.build: npm run generate:assets && vite build && node scripts/build-static.mjs && npm run validate
scripts.generate:assets: npm run generate:audio && npm run slice:assets && npm run slice:mobs && npm run slice:objects && npm run slice:icons && npm run brand:assets && npm run optimize:images
